description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the 'InventorySyncWorker' solution, which contains standard enterprise boilerplate (Serilog, Polly). Export the InventorySyncWorker project as a reusable Visual Studio Project Template. The template name must be 'Standard Corp Worker' and the description must be 'Company standard worker service with Serilog and Polly.'. Ensure no icon or preview image is included in the template.

metadata.expected_template_desc: Company standard worker service with Serilog and Polly.
